---
title: "Talks"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
---

Conference presentations, seminars, and invited talks. This list matches the Presentations section of my [CV](/cv.qmd).
